underlying_goal: Fix broken Hyprland config (rules and hyprpaper) after upgrading to version 0.53 with breaking changes
friction_detail: Initial rule migration used incorrect property names (missing underscores like suppressevent instead of suppress_event), requiring a second round of fixes after user reported config errors.
brief_summary: User needed to fix their Hyprland config after a breaking v0.53 update; Claude migrated hyprpaper and window rules to the new syntax, set up systemd service for hyprpaper, and fixed property naming errors, mostly resolving the issues.
